title: draba incana
intro: Draba incana, also known as the white mountain cress or alpine whitlowgrass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Draba incana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Draba incana can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to support immune function.
